series_metadata.series_description: Records (including, but not limited to, use of force investigation packets, incident reports, and grievance procedure documents) received from another agency (including, but not limited to, the Department of Rehabilitation and Correction and the Department of Youth Services) that are used by CIIC staff in the process of responding to an inmate letter or developing a report.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: May be destroyed upon receipt. ; Electronic: May be destroyed upon receipt., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
